title: SV: Using string argument with default value gives error

features.name: class constructor with string parameter default value
features.description: Code should include a class constructor that has a string parameter with a default string value

features.name: instantiation with constructor default args
features.description: Code should include instantiating an object using new() with no arguments to rely on default parameter values

features.name: virtual class definition
features.description: Code should include a virtual class definition as part of an inheritance hierarchy

features.name: class inheritance chain
features.description: Code should include a multi-level class inheritance chain with constructors

features.name: virtual function in class
features.description: Code should include a virtual function definition inside a class
